title: Bridge Essay: Explaining the influence of biophilic design on employee well-being.
concept: Biophilia, nature connectedness, neurobiophilia, environmental neuroscience.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Ecology/Animism** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Ecology/Animism — biophilia, nature connectedness, environmental neuroscience, neurobiophilia.
**Phase context:** Biophilia, nature connectedness, neurobiophilia, environmental neuroscience.

**Explaining the influence of biophilic design on employee well-being.** — Sci Rep (2024). DOI: 10.1038/s41598-024-83791-9. PMID: 39738781. Biophilic workplace design has been proposed as an effective strategy to increase employee well-being in open-plan offices. To expand our understanding of why and for whom indoor nature exposure increases well-being, the aim of this study was to evaluate vigor as a mediator and to examine whether nature relatedness is a direct antecedent of nature exposure or a moderator of the relationship between exposure to nature and vigor.
